title: UAV Software Integration
entry_mechanism: PSAP Track 6 GADD co-development + Track 1 defence software company attraction
executive_summary: Software sovereignty in military UAV systems is more strategically significant than hardware sovereignty. A UAV whose mission planning, ground control, and navigation software is foreign-owned is a foreign-controlled system regardless of where its airframe was built. Node MA-4 establishes Saudi software engineering capability for UAV ground and mission systems, starting with the Akinci programme and building the engineering foundation for GADD's future sovereign UAV development. Source code ownership in a Saudi legal entity is the non-negotiable SAEL condition.

companies.name: Baykar
